svn .diff

Portrevision because the new sysctl object {0.7} "sysctl.nextnoskip" overlaps the OIDs of sysctlinfo and sysctlbyname-improved, review D26560 - base r366465 

Portrevision:

 * add PORTREVISION for bump bug #250148 and bug #250149
 * add files/patch-libsysctlmibinfo2.h to change the sysctl OID of ENTRYIDINPUTBYNAME
